summary: NFS mount flapping causes intermittent restore failures
description: Restores on the eu-west cluster failed intermittently overnight, roughly one in five. No consistent shard or host implicated.

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: The automounter on that cluster has been flapping since a network change last week, per the NFS troubleshooting runbook. Failures line up with the flap timestamps in the host logs.

comments.author: Sam Whitfield
comments.body: ok will avoid kicking off big restores on eu-west until this clears

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: Networking rolled back the change that caused the flap. Ran ten consecutive restores clean afterward. Resolving, will keep an eye on it through the week.
